report_summary.hardness_definition: RL is harder only when RL accuracy is lower than benchmark accuracy and/or RL failure_rate is higher than benchmark failure_rate. Mean preference margin is reported separately as a signed confidence or boundary-proximity measure.

hardness_definition: RL is harder only when RL accuracy is lower than benchmark accuracy and/or RL failure_rate is higher than benchmark failure_rate. Mean preference margin is reported separately as a signed confidence or boundary-proximity measure.
